title: Cohere and University of Toronto announce multi-year AI partnership
watch: Any independent (non-reprint) outlet coverage of the deal, which would let a future update cite third-party confirmation rather than the two parties' own announcements
Launch of U of T's enterprise AI platform and AI Kitchen (both pre-launch as of this writing) -- worth a follow-up once either goes live
Cohere's separate 2025 federal-government North deployment (Government of Canada/ISED MOU) -- a distinct, not-yet-verified story surfaced during falsification; not folded into this article
cycle_2026-07-18_night_c1_note: New standalone story (dedup-check: no match). Candidate surfaced from cycle-1 Tier-0 sweep, verified via parallel fresh verifier + adversarial falsifier sub-agents. Falsifier flagged framing risk (platform/AI Kitchen described as forthcoming, not live) and independence caveat (joint self-announcement, no third-party coverage found) -- both resolved by rewriting rather than holding, since neither was a fact dispute. Style gates run on both languages: pass, no cuts needed.
